title: selaginella potaroensis
intro: Selaginella potaroensis, also known as Devil's Claw Spikemoss, is a type of small, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its spiky, green foliage. The medicinal properties of Selaginella potaroensis lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis, rheumatism, and other inflammatory diseases, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. Herbal preparations of Selaginella potaroensis can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
